title: Xaero's Minimap and Waystones Compatibility
description: Automatically adds a new waypoint to Xaero's Minimap when adding/activating/renaming a Waystone.
body:
# Xaero's Minimap and Waystones Compatibility

**Xaero's Minimap and Waystones Compatibility** automatically links **Waystones** with **Xaero’s Minimap**, creating and updating waypoints without any manual setup.

Whenever a Waystone is activated or renamed, a matching waypoint is instantly created or updated on Xaero’s Minimap at the same location.

All waypoints are persistent, and the mod works in both singleplayer and multiplayer servers.

![Waystone waypoint example](https://i.ibb.co/C36Dpx6P/2025-12-27-17-24-12.png)
